# doit_folders (Data Source)

List Cloud Analytics folders.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve all folders
data "doit_folders" "all" {}

# Output folder count
output "total_folders" {
  value = data.doit_folders.all.row_count
}

# Output folder names
output "folder_names" {
  value = [for f in data.doit_folders.all.folders : f.name]
}

# Retrieve the first page of folders
data "doit_folders" "first_page" {
  max_results = "5"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `max_results` (String) The maximum number of results to return in a single page. Use the page tokens to iterate through the entire collection.
- `page_token` (String) Page token, returned by a previous call, to request the next page of results
- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `folders` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--folders))
- `row_count` (Number) Number of folders returned in this page.

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) A string that can be [parsed as a duration](https://pkg.go.dev/time#ParseDuration) consisting of numbers and unit suffixes, such as "30s" or "2h45m". Valid time units are "s" (seconds), "m" (minutes), "h" (hours).


<a id="nestedatt--folders"></a>
### Nested Schema for `folders`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Folder description.
- `id` (String) Folder ID.
- `name` (String) Folder name.
- `parent_folder_id` (String) Identifier of the parent folder. Set to "root" if the folder is at the top level.
